text: I feel a sense of curiosity and mild anticipation in this modern, slightly sterile environment. The first space with its glass doors and quiet halls feels almost meditative—an entryway to contemplation. Upon moving to the R+D exhibit, a more vibrant and intellectually engaging energy emerges. The colorful wall and intriguing text draw my mind toward innovation and the relationship between humans and technology. It's an environment that invites reflection on progress, community, and the possibilities of the future. I am both a quiet observer and a participant in the unfolding story of creativity and research.
